# comfyui_prompt_to_workspace (Data Source)

Translates ComfyUI prompt JSON into a synthetic workspace JSON representation with structured fidelity reporting.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "comfyui_prompt_to_workspace" "example" {
  name = "translated-workspace"
  prompt_json = jsonencode({
    "1" = {
      class_type = "LoadImage"
      inputs = {
        image = "example.png"
      }
    }
    "2" = {
      class_type = "SaveImage"
      inputs = {
        images          = ["1", 0]
        filename_prefix = "translated_prompt"
      }
    }
  })
}

output "workspace_fidelity" {
  value = data.comfyui_prompt_to_workspace.example.fidelity
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `prompt_json` (String) ComfyUI prompt JSON to translate.

### Optional

- `name` (String) Optional name for the translated workspace.

### Read-Only

- `fidelity` (String) Overall translation fidelity classification.
- `notes` (List of String) Human-readable translation notes.
- `preserved_fields` (List of String) Field paths preserved exactly during translation.
- `synthesized_fields` (List of String) Field paths synthesized during translation.
- `unsupported_fields` (List of String) Field paths dropped or not representable during translation.
- `workspace_json` (String) Translated workspace JSON.
